parameters.text: ={{ ['Investigate this Kubernetes incident:', 'Alert: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.alertname, 'Namespace: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.namespace, 'Pod: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.pod, 'Severity: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.severity, 'Duration: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.durationStr, 'Summary: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.summary, 'Description: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.description, 'Confidence: ' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.confidenceLabel + ' (' + $('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.confidencePct + '%)', 'Signals: ' + JSON.stringify($('PromQL Enrichment + Confidence').first().json.signals.map(s => s.label + '=' + s.value)), 'Use kubectl_read and promql tools to verify. Then assess root cause.'].join('\n') }}

parameters.toolDescription: Run read-only kubectl commands to investigate the cluster
